examples: We had a huge postbag on the subject from our readers.
The editor, though, has access to the paper's postbag, and presumably is confident he's in tune with the thinking of many of his readers.
He must have had a huge postbag but on each occasion I received a helpful and encouraging reply, typed on his famous old typewriter.
Their postbag, they claim, is bulging with applications from high-calibre people who want to be on the board of the regional agency when it starts work in 1999.
